items.caption: A computer monitor displaying a video card. the monitor is turned off, and the screen is black. the background is white, and there is text above the monitor that explains how the monitor displays information generated by the computer through the video card. the text is in black and reads "monitor" at the top, followed by a description of how the monitor works. the style of the image is informational and educational, likely intended to explain the function of a computer monitor.
